news.title: GODSpeed — first playable build is here
news.body: The first working build of GODSpeed is live in the launcher. Race and explore the solarpunk island of Eline: drive Chaos-physics cars against AI rivals, watch cinematic replays, buy land and build a sea-to-fuel industry chain while the island city grows around you.

games.title: GODSpeed
games.description: Race, build and grow on the solarpunk island of Eline. Drive the VS Lens and four tiers of Chaos-physics cars, race AI rivals that learn your lines, watch cinematic replays, buy land, build a sea-to-fuel industry chain and watch the island city grow around you.

files.title: Example Beta Build
files.description: Replace with a real gated download. Point repo at a PRIVATE repo — only GitHub users you invite as collaborators can see and download its release assets.
